title.en: BBC to show England's World Cup semi-final
title.zh-CN: 英国广播公司将播出英格兰世界杯半决赛

summary.en: England's World Cup semi-final against Argentina or Switzerland will be broadcast live on BBC One and BBC iPlayer.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰对阵阿根廷或瑞士的世界杯半决赛将在BBC One和BBC iPlayer上直播。

title.en: Was VAR right to overturn England penalty?
title.zh-CN: VAR是否有权推翻英格兰罚款？

summary.en: England have a penalty overturned following a VAR review after Djed Spence was judged to have initiated the contact with Norway's Oscar Bobb during the first half of extra time in Miami.
summary.zh-CN: 在VAR审查后，英格兰的处罚被推翻，因为Djed Spence被判定在迈阿密加时赛的前半段与挪威的Oscar Bobb进行了接触。

title.en: Klopp agrees to replace Nagelsmann as Germany coach
title.zh-CN: 克洛普同意取代纳格尔斯曼担任德国教练

summary.en: Jurgen Klopp agrees a deal in principle to become the new head coach of Germany's men's national team after the resignation of Julian Nagelsmann.
summary.zh-CN: 尤尔根·克洛普（ Jurgen Klopp ）原则上同意在朱利安·纳格尔斯曼（ Julian Nagelsmann ）辞职后成为德国男子国家队的新任主教练。

title.en: Argentina midfield great Rattin dies aged 89
title.zh-CN: 阿根廷中场GREAT RATTIN去世，享年89岁

summary.en: Argentina great Antonio Rattin, whose sending-off at the 1966 World Cup led to the introduction of red and yellow cards, dies aged 89.
summary.zh-CN: 阿根廷伟大的安东尼奥·拉廷（ Antonio Rattin ）在1966年世界杯上首发红牌和黄牌，享年89岁。

title.en: When the World Cup finishes, the football continues on BBC Sport
title.zh-CN: 世界杯结束后，英国广播公司体育频道继续播放足球赛事

summary.en: When the World Cup ends we'll still have loads of great content every day as we build up to the new football season.
summary.zh-CN: 当世界杯结束时，随着我们为新的足球赛季做准备，我们每天仍然会有大量精彩的内容。

title.en: From Arsenal jeers to Swiss tears: Xhaka's redemption
title.zh-CN: 从阿森纳的嘲笑到瑞士的眼泪：查卡的救赎

summary.en: Granit Xhaka has battled back from being booed by his own fans at Arsenal to being one of the most influential players for club and country as he looks to help Switzerland make history at the World...
